parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf07845-conversation`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Collect Raw Text

### Collect Raw Text

Shapes the item: writes `content`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Extract Structured Fields

### Extract Structured Fields

Pulls structured fields (sessionId, message, intent) out of free text using a strict extraction prompt.

Next: All Required Fields Found?

### Anthropic Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Extract Structured Fields** as `languageModel`

🔑 Anthropic API key

### All Required Fields Found?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.output?.sessionId }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Upsert into Google Sheets · ②→ Queue for Manual Review

### Upsert into Google Sheets

googleSheets — `appendOrUpdate` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Review Paths

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Queue for Manual Review

gmail — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Review Paths

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Merge Review Paths

Rejoins 2 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Send Summary to Gmail

### Send Summary to Gmail

gmail — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

# Run an assistant workflow with Gmail for Lead Bots

**Pattern:** AI Agent · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Run an assistant workflow with Gmail for Lead Bots. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual lead bots is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook → Collect Raw Text → Extract Structured Fields → All Required Fields Found? → Upsert into Google Sheets → Merge Review Paths → Send Summary to Gmail

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai agent without manual effort
- Anyone automating lead bots in customer support
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Keeps your systems in sync
- Removes copy-paste errors
- Has retries and error handling built in

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Anthropic API key; Google OAuth2; Google OAuth2 / service account.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🔐 Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials — never in node parameters.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your lead bots process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
